name: Spam Swiss Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Bake pie shell for 6-8 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
3. In a bowl, beat together eggs, whipping cream, and pepper. Stir in SPAM and onion.
4. Sprinkle one cup of cheese into the pie shell.
5. Pour egg mixture over the cheese.
6. Sprinkle the remaining cheese over the egg layer.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until eggs are set.
